name_cn:
MCM Stark Visetos
Classic nail backpack
dp exclusive®️ classic cognac
This season's small Stark backpack is a reinterpretation of the MCM classic. Made of our signature Visetos coated canvas, with luxurious faux leather lining. Structured design with spacious interior and pyramid nail trim to add a bold style to your look.
Model: MMK6SVE37CO001
Dimensions: 33*13*26cm
Color: Cognac/Brown
